safe_read_only_actions.description: Observe DevHub home structure and status labels without recording private values.
Observe list structure, filter labels, and status affordances without storing case values.
Observe fee notice structure without storing payment details or private account values.

reversible_draft_actions.description: Application setup may change draft state and is not read-only.

consequential_official_actions.description: Uploads attach materials to an official record and require exact confirmation.
Payment execution is a financial official action and requires exact confirmation.
Certification and submission are official actions.
Inspection scheduling or cancellation changes official state.
